document.title: Git Yard Mission
document.purpose: Define the purpose and responsibilities of Git Yard.

mission.core-idea: Git Yard is a system for managing a local collection of Git repositories in relation to a user's GitHub account.
responsibilities: Watch over a designated folder containing Git repositories.
Determine whether local repositories contain work not present on GitHub.
Identify local repositories that may be safely removed.
Identify and clone repositories from GitHub that are not present locally.
